compliance_note: Local file read only. NO Amazon API. NO Amazon.com scrape. user_id hashed (sha256/16). Image + video URLs dropped at parse time. Phase 8.5B.2 writes ZERO source_records, ZERO personas, ZERO traits, ZERO evidence-links.

brief.product_description: A portable mineral sunscreen stick designed for acne-prone college students and outdoor athletes who want daily face protection they can reapply during school, workouts, hikes, and outdoor sports without feeling greasy or causing breakouts.
target_customers: people who avoid sunscreen because it feels greasy or inconvenient to reapply
optional_constraints: Do not manually provide sunscreen anchors. Assembly must infer all anchors itself.

target_customers: people who avoid sunscreen because it feels greasy or inconvenient to reapply
use_case_anchor_terms: people who avoid sunscreen because it feels greasy or inconvenient to reapply
caveats: Anchor plan is deterministic — derived from the founder brief alone. No LLM, no network. Adding new product domains does NOT require code changes; the same planner runs.
Generic modifiers ('flavor', 'price', etc.) ONLY count when co-occurring with a brief-derived anchor.
